name: Tool Request
about: Suggest a new developer utility for ZeroTools
title: '[TOOL] '
labels: enhancement, new-tool
assignees: kdippan
---

## Tool Name
<!-- e.g., YAML to JSON Converter, Base32 Encoder -->

## Description
<!-- What does this tool do? Why is it useful for developers? -->

## Client-Side Feasibility
<!-- ZeroTools are 100% client-side (no backend APIs). Can this tool be built without a server? Are there reliable vanilla JS CDN libraries (like cdnjs) that can handle the logic? -->

## Expected UI / Inputs
<!-- Describe the expected layout. What are the inputs? What are the options/toggles? -->
- **Input:** 
- **Options:** 
- **Output:** 

## Similar Existing Tools
<!-- Link to existing tools online that do this (so we can reverse-engineer a faster, ad-free version for https://zerotools-io.vercel.app). -->
